prompt: ok this is kinda urgent - found a bug in production in our recommendation model. I'm on a branch HF-9182/fix-recommendation-scoring and I have one commit '(HF-9182) fix(ml_jobs): correct feature normalization in ranking'. Need to get this PR up ASAP so someone can review and we can deploy. The bug was causing some items to get artificially boosted scores.

assertions.name: PR title matches regex format
assertions.description: The generated PR title must match the required format

assertions.name: PR title includes HF ticket ID
PR description mentions production bug
assertions.description: Description should state this fixes a production issue
